untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calculation of 'Yesterday's High + 0.5 × Yesterday's Range' and gap tolerance comparisons that cannot be expressed with single indicator comparisons. Requires multi-step arithmetic on previous bar data that exceeds the atomic condition structure. Also requires explicit profit target logic (Entry + 1.0 × risk taken) which is not supported in the condition syntax.
translation_notes: Approximated entry using close > prev_high (volatility breakout concept) and volume confirmation via vol_ratio_20. Stop-loss set to 1.0% representing the Yesterday's High - 1.0 × Yesterday's Range logic. Hold_days_max set to 3 for time-based exit. Full signal requires custom indicator or multi-condition expression engine.
